{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Akura Soulsmith library
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura Soulsmith library]] lacks relevant information because each member has their own built-in armor.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
